snippets.text: Jambo, your SIM swap is being resolved. We apologize for any inconvenience caused. Please be patient as we process your request.
SIM swap vetting failed. Advised customer to visit the nearest Safaricom Retail Center with valid ID for further assistance.
KYC mismatch detected. Advised customer to visit the nearest Safaricom Retail Center with correct ID details for SIM swap.
Line not active. Advised customer to call from alternate line or visit nearest Safaricom Retail Center for replacement SIM.
Jambo, reversal initiated with 2-hour SLA. Educated customer on Hakikisha feature. Advised to be patient during processing.
Jambo, reversal initiated with 72-hour SLA. Educated customer on Hakikisha feature. Advised to be patient during processing.
Jambo, reversal initiated with 12-hour SLA. Educated customer on Hakikisha. Advised to wait for confirmation.
Jambo, sasa ni rahisi kuhakikisha kwamba pesa zako zinaenda kwa nambari sahihi na M-PESA. HAKIKISHA kwa kubonyeza 1 KUKAMILISHA au 2 KUSIMAMISHA kutuma pesa.
Jambo, to reverse forward the M-PESA message to 456 within 24 hours. Thank you. For PayBill reversal, send M-PESA message to SMS 456.
Jambo, dial *334#>My Account>M-PESA PIN Manager>Set M-PESA Security Questions and answers>Enter ID/PP number>Set 3 Questions>Enter M-PESA PIN. Thank you.
Jambo, to reset PIN dial *334#>My Account>M-PESA PIN Manager>M-PESA Forgot PIN>Enter ID/PP number>Answer security questions provided to get PIN. Thank you.
To set up M-PESA security questions: Dial *334#>My Account>M-PESA PIN Manager>Set M-PESA Security Questions and answers>Follow prompts.
Jambo, dial *334#>My account>Unlock M-PESA PIN>ID number>Wait for confirmation message. Thank you.
Dial *334#>Select My Account>Choose M-PESA Statement>Select Full Statement>Choose duration (1, 3, 6, or 12 months)>Enter your email. PDF received within minutes.
Jambo, kupata PUK ya line iliyofungika, bonyeza *456# ukitumia simu nyingine na kuchagua Get PUK Number na kufuata maagizo. Asante.
To get PUK for the blocked line, dial *100# from a different line, select Get PUK number or click https://safaricomapp.page.link/get-puk.
We failed to bill you accurately for Fuliza taken earlier due to a system issue. An adjustment has been made to correct this. The billing is now accurate going forward. Sorry for the inconvenience.
Sub advised to save, transact in and out of the loan account and continue using Safaricom services to increase loan limit over time.
Service Request raised for pooled line recreation. SLA: 72 hours. Customer advised to be patient as request is processed.
Note: M-PESA PIN and Service PIN are the same (Bonga PIN). Customer advised to reset Service PIN using Safaricom App.
To reset voicemail PIN: Sub advised to dial 132 and follow prompts to change the PIN.
Line is not active on IN data (expired). Advised customer to top up their account to resume services.
Our Stamped M-PESA Statement is now available for FREE without visiting any retail shop or calling. Dial *334#>My account>M-PESA statement>Full statement.
Jambo, click on https://m-pesaforbusiness.co.ke/LNM/ to apply for a till. Thank you.
Sub advised to restrict background data, stop auto download of videos and photos, stop auto updates of apps to efficiently manage data usage.
